description: Designed for everyday use, this backpack from reebok is perfect for carrying your stuff in style. The bag comes with enough compartments to hold your essentials and even a laptop. Height: 17"Width: 13" Made of nylon with complete protective lining for easy cleaning and durability Branded zippers and sliders Big roomy main compartment with seperate padded laptop chamber Front utility pocket for holding your essentials reebok badge on the facade made of different contrasting panels Mesh pockets on the sides for holding sipper etc Haul loop for easy handling Mesh padding on the back and straps for extra comfort, ventillation and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Adjustable straps for an ergonomic Fit and better support CareHand washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not ironDo not wringDrip dry
